_comment: pm-agent-style post-implementation capture (DESIGN.md §6, §7). Block/allow/log only — deliberately stays within the JetBrains-safe subset (preToolUse there can deny but not rewrite input, per DESIGN.md §5). VERIFY the exact hook schema against Copilot's current hooks reference before relying on this in production; written against the event names documented as of DESIGN.md's research (postToolUse, agentStop) but not yet hands-on tested against a real Copilot hook runtime.

agentStop.description: Reminds pm-agent to capture what was implemented, once a session/agent run completes. Log-only — does not block or modify anything.
agentStop.message: Session ended. If this involved a non-trivial implementation, invoke pm-agent to document patterns/decisions before closing out (DESIGN.md §5f pm-agent spec).
